text.tspan: PRE-NIGHT вЂ” issues status:ready, goals active, outcome history loaded, CLAUDE_QUOTA_PRESSURE=false
ACT 1 вЂ” initial implementation (cron tick, gated by quota)
container up, checkout new feat branch,
ACT 2 вЂ” automatic review (synchronous on PR open / push)
ACT 3 вЂ” programmatic watcher reacts (within 30-60s of event)
separate container, parallel with other sandcastles

g.text: [scope-creep вЂ” LOC delta > 50% OR files outside initial diff]
[conflicting findings вЂ” same file colon line touched in 2 attempts]

svg.text: read CLAUDE_QUOTA_PRESSURE вЂ” abort if true
gh issue list status:ready вЂ” pick e.g. 553
push branch + open PR with rich body (Closes 553)
post verdict as issue-comment вЂ” Request Changes 5 CRITICAL plus 6 MAJOR
poll: SELECT FROM events_canonical WHERE processed=false
gate check вЂ” quota_cache.weekly < 80%, else skip
per-PR lock check вЂ” outcome_records pattern_tags pr-N in_flight 2h
gh pr view 631 вЂ” fetch latest body + reviews + statusCheck
git checkout existing branch вЂ” push fix commits
PR label status:needs-human + summary comment + body update (
SessionStart hook вЂ” overnight events digest, status:needs-human queue, quota state
handle status:needs-human PRs (manual fix or close)
optional /verify вЂ” enrich outcomes with merge result
